_comment: Act 1 / Challenge 1.2 — Substation Reroute (combat, 3 waves). Loaded by beacon firmware at /spiffs/challenge_1_2.json. Also consumed by the software simulator (sim/).
name: Substation Reroute

beacon._lat_lon_note: Near the ComEd North Side service territory; adjust to actual festival venue coordinates.

_timing_note: 3-minute window covers the full 3-wave fight with room for reconnect lag.

combat._enemy_hp_note: Demand spikes escalate: wave 1 (60 HP feeder fault), wave 2 (80 HP loop overload), wave 3 (100 HP main bus spike).
combat._rng_note: Combat is server-authoritative: the server generates and records the rolls that resolve the fight. A badge may attach optional onion.secure_random entropy, never trusted as the roll itself. No badge signing (onion.se_sign does not exist).

custom.flavor: DEEPDISH has tripped the feeders. Close three breakers to restore power.

sim._comment: Settings used by sim/ when acting as a software beacon for this challenge.
sim._port_note: UDP port the sim listens on for badge ESP-NOW frames (one port per beacon).
